title: FX Brief — 17 Jun 2026
intro:
Broad USD weakness continues as safe-haven CHF and commodity currencies outperform while JPY remains pressured near intervention levels.
💪 CURRENCY RANKING
CHF +0.98% — Safe-haven flows dominate as European risk sentiment improves; strongest performer against USD
AUD +0.94% — Commodity rally and China optimism drive gains; leading risk-sensitive currencies higher
EUR +0.65% — Bullish momentum extends above 1.16 on ECB rate path expectations and solid eurozone data
NZD +0.44% — Risk-on tone supports kiwi despite lagging AUD; dairy price strength provides underlying support
CAD +0.41% — Oil prices firm but gains capped by domestic growth concerns; underperforming commodity peers
GBP +0.38% — Sterling consolidates near 1.34 as BoE policy uncertainty limits upside despite USD weakness
USD -0.41% — Greenback softer across the board on dovish Fed repricing and declining Treasury yields
JPY -0.16% — Yen weakest at 160.27 as BOJ maintains ultra-loose policy; intervention risk escalating

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1610 +0.65% | LONG | S:1.1565 R:1.1680 — Momentum breakout targeting 1.17 handle
AUDUSD 0.7060 +0.94% | LONG | S:0.7015 R:0.7125 — Commodity strength supports further upside
USDJPY 160.27 -0.16% | SHORT | S:161.50 R:158.80 — Vulnerable to MOF intervention above 160
USDCHF 0.7921 -0.98% | SHORT | S:0.8000 R:0.7850 — Swiss strength accelerates below 0.79
🔄 CROSS PAIRS
EURAUD 1.6446 -0.28% | SHORT | S:1.6520 R:1.6320 — AUD outperformance to continue on risk appetite
AUDCAD 0.9881 +1.32% | LONG | S:0.9830 R:1.0000 — Commodity divergence favors aussie over loonie

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: AUDUSD 0.7060 | SL:0.7010 | TP:0.7140 | China optimism and commodity rally extend gains
LONG: EURUSD 1.1615 | SL:1.1560 | TP:1.1700 | Technical breakout confirms bullish continuation pattern
SHORT: USDJPY 160.25 | SL:161.60 | TP:158.50 | Intervention risk extreme; asymmetric reward-risk setup
SHORT: USDCAD 1.4005 | SL:1
